$comment: Schema version 2025-12-11 is the current MCP Registry standard. Only essential env vars are exposed here; USE_* feature flags are documented at websiteUrl and available via MCPB toggles.
name: io.github.structured-world/gitlab-mcp
title: Advanced GitLab MCP server
description: 58 CQRS tools exposing 230 GitLab operations across 26 entity types
_versionNote: Updated dynamically by prepare-release.sh during semantic-release

environmentVariables.description: GitLab Personal Access Token with 'api' and 'read_user' scopes
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: GitLab instance API URL for self-hosted instances (defaults to https://gitlab.com)
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Enable read-only mode (disable all manage_* write operations)
environmentVariables.name: GITLAB_READ_ONLY_MODE
